creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253832
git diff to prevent java/openjdk8 in RUN_DEPENDS

Patch to prevent a RUN_DEPENDS on java/openjdk8.
This port is a library included in other projects so no need to define what openjdk must be installed.
By defining RUN_DEPENDS changes are high that multiple JDKs are installed in the end.
